diff_summary: Touches the login form, the rate-limit middleware, and the session cookie helper. Pulls in 7 tests across 3 spec files; skipping 142 unaffected tests.

selected.case: wrong password shows generic error and clears password field @p1
unknown email shows the same generic error @security
five failed attempts locks the account @rate-limit
session persists across a hard reload @p1

notes: Cut wall-clock from ~9 min (full suite) to ~38 s by skipping unrelated areas. Strategy auto-escalates to full suite if impact analysis yields > 25% of the corpus.
